pattern_ja: アポなし突然訪問『今日だけ無料点検』
reason_en: 90-95% of unannounced door-to-door termite inspections are fraudulent. Legitimate companies do not solicit door-to-door.

pattern_en: Showing rotted wood samples from elsewhere as evidence
pattern_ja: 他家のボロボロ木材を見せて煽る
reason_en: Pre-staged props brought from another location to manufacture urgency.

pattern_en: No subfloor photos or use of other property's photos
pattern_ja: 床下写真なし・他家の写真使用
reason_en: Inability to verify whether the inspected location is the customer's home.

pattern_en: 'Sign today or face 2M yen damage next year'
pattern_ja: 『今日契約しないと200万被害に』
reason_en: Pressure tactics designed to bypass cooling-off period and prevent multi-vendor quotes.

pattern_en: Neither JTCCA membership nor licensed technicians
pattern_ja: JTCCA加盟も有資格者もいない
reason_en: Below minimum credibility threshold; no industry accountability.

pattern_en: Verbal agreements only - no contract or warranty docs
pattern_ja: 契約書なし・保証書なしの口約束
reason_en: Eliminates customer recourse for post-construction issues.

pattern_ja: 相場の2-3倍（¥80-100万超）の見積もり
reason_en: Market rate for 30tsubo extermination is 130-250K JPY (HS basis 180K).

pattern_en: 'Direct deal' pricing under half of market rate
pattern_ja: 相場の半額以下『直接取引で安い』
reason_en: Indicator of diluted chemical concentration or skipped procedures.

pattern_en: Soil barrier method proposed for drywood termite
pattern_ja: アメリカカンザイなのにバリア工法のみ
reason_en: Soil treatment is ineffective against drywood termites; suggests vendor incompetence.

pattern_en: Vague damage descriptions without numerical assessments
pattern_ja: 『床下がヤバい』曖昧表現で数値なし
reason_en: Absence of damage area (m²) or residual strength assessment indicates lack of professional inspection.
Chemical efficacy is physically limited to ~5 years per JTCCA standards.

pattern_en: No explanation of inspection access points or under-floor route
pattern_ja: 点検口位置・床下経路の説明なし
reason_en: Ambiguity about whether full or partial coverage will be performed.

pattern_en: No ventilation guidance during chemical application
pattern_ja: 薬剤散布中の室内換気対策未説明
reason_en: Risk of sick-building symptoms and chemical sensitivity exposure.
